mapper.select: SELECT pictureId AS pictureId, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 0 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS impressionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 1 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS clickCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 2 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS viewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 3 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS likeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 4 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS collectCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 5 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS downloadCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 6 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS shareCount FROM user_picture_action GROUP BY pictureId

SELECT pictureId AS pictureId, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 0 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS impressionCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 1 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS clickCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 2 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS viewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 3 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS likeCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 4 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS collectCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 5 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS downloadCount, SUM(CASE WHEN actionType = 6 THEN actionValue ELSE 0 END) AS shareCount FROM user_picture_action WHERE isProcessed = 0 AND createdTime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY pictureId
